sections.paragraph:
Pound The Hebrew word »maneh« is translated »pound,« and is equivalent to about one pound, fourteen ounces
1Ki 10:17; Ezr 2:69; Neh 7:72
Equivalent to about twelve ounces
Joh 12:3
The Greek word »mina« is translated »pound,« and worth approximately nineteen dollars
Luk 19:25
Measure; Weights
